description:
BONES BONES BONES
 (contains flashing imagery) 
I'm always making HABROMANIA content about Alice or the Queen of Hearts so I figured it was about time to give y'all some Hatter content. He's my favorite character to write, can you tell I love sleezebag too-chatty salesman-type characters? Anyway out of everyone in the game I think he takes the cake for most unhinged- I don't even think he knows where he is half the time, much less WHO he is.  Poor baby.
.
I have been wanting to make this video for a year but kept working on content for the video game (like backgrounds and cutscenes), but finally had some time this weekend to work on this. Took forever and I listened to the song on loop the entire time and never got sick of it.

Anyway check out my page for more HABROMANIA stuff while you wait for the demo to be out next month(ish)
